g.text: Rote: the memory manager for browser agents
the context window is a managed resource: a budget, an eviction policy, a layout contract, a trust gate
TIER 1 - EPISODIC (across runs of a task)
TIER 2 - SEMANTIC (across tasks on a site)
TRUST GATE - the precondition for every tier (invariant 1)
memory re-enters context only through assertions; success is page state, never 'no exception thrown'
design vs reality: docs/02 §Status is authoritative
